title: Adding ROLLUP breaks group labels
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE TestTable (ID SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, Value DOUBLE PRECISION, Category VARCHAR(50));
INSERT INTO TestTable (ID, Value, Category) VALUES (1, RANDOM(), 'A');
INSERT INTO TestTable (ID, Value, Category) SELECT ID + 1, CASE WHEN RANDOM() < 0.5 THEN NULL ELSE RANDOM() END, 'B' FROM TestTable;
SELECT ROUND(Value::numeric, 1) AS rounded_value, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TestTable GROUP BY ROUND(Value::numeric, 1);
SELECT ROUND(Value::numeric, 1) AS rounded_value, COUNT(*) AS count FROM TestTable GROUP BY ROUND(Value::numeric, 1) WITH ROLLUP;
key_bug_features: Adding WITH ROLLUP to grouped report breaks labels
